metadata.description: AI video generation skills with automatic model selection across 10+ engines.

plugins.name: pexo
plugins.description: AI video generation — describe what you want, Pexo picks the best model across 10+ engines (Seedance, Kling, Veo, Sora) and returns a finished, multi-shot video with music, subtitles, and transitions. Includes the Pexo agent plus image, audio, director, and model-prompting skills.
